title: Do you sell ChatGPT access?
answer: No. Atlas sells configuration, guidance, onboarding, workflow design, and support around customer use of ChatGPT. Customer platform access requirements should be made explicit on the site.

title: What does Atlas actually deliver?
answer: Atlas delivers structured onboarding, usage guidance, workflow fit, package configuration, and proof-oriented support. Public wording should focus on operational outcomes rather than raw prompt resale.

title: Is secure managed delivery live at launch?
answer: No. The launch is ChatGPT-first. Secure managed delivery and related secure runtime structures are prepared in architecture and governance but should not be marketed as active launch dependencies until implemented.
